creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
geoipupdate.sh traps error codes.

[root@apnoea ~] tail -3 /usr/local/bin/geoipupdate.sh
_fetch "FAILhttp://geolite.maxmind.com/download/geoip/database/GeoLiteCountry/GeoIP.dat.gz" GeoIP.dat                                                                       

_fetch "http://geolite.maxmind.com/download/geoip/database/GeoIPv6.dat.gz" GeoIPv6.dat

[root@apnoea ~] geoipupdate.sh
Fetching GeoIP.dat and GeoIPv6.dat...
fetch: FAILhttp://geolite.maxmind.com/download/geoip/database/GeoLiteCountry/GeoIP.dat.gz: Invalid URL scheme
GeoIP.dat download failed

(1)[root@apnoea ~] echo $? 
1
